import React from "react"; import whyBg from "../../../assets/why_section_bg.png"; // ✅ correct path import iconClapper from "../../../assets/clapper_icon.png"; import iconBolt from "../../../assets/bolt_icon.png"; import iconGlobe from "../../../assets/globe_icon.png"; export default function WhySection({ onOpenDemo }) { return (
{/* Background */}
{/* soft vignette */}

Why CineGate

Public film licensing redesigned for African cinema.

{/* Card 1 */}

Public screenings are complicated

  • Licensing is unclear
  • Negotiations are slow
  • Many venues screen films informally
{/* Card 2 (highlight) */}

Pay once.{" "} Screen once.

  • Download licensed film
  • Screen it one time
  • Access automatically expires
{/* Card 3 */}

More African films on more screens

  • Legal access for venues
  • Revenue for filmmakers
  • Cultural visibility globally

Experience the one-time screening model

); } const S = { section: { position: "relative", overflow: "hidden", padding: "72px 0 84px", color: "#fff", }, bg: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, backgroundSize: "cover", backgroundPosition: "center", transform: "scale(1.02)", filter: "saturate(1.05) contrast(1.05)", zIndex: 0, }, vignette: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, background: "radial-gradient(80% 70% at 50% 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.35) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.72) 70%, rgba(0,0,0,0.88) 100%)", zIndex: 1, }, container: { position: "relative", zIndex: 2, maxWidth: 1180, margin: "0 auto", padding: "0 28px", }, header: { textAlign: "center", marginBottom: 34 }, title: { margin: 0, fontSize: 56, lineHeight: 1.02, fontWeight: 800, letterSpacing: 0.2, textShadow: "0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, subtitle: { margin: "12px 0 0", fontSize: 18, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.78)", textShadow: "0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)", }, grid: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr))", gap: 18, alignItems: "stretch", }, // ✅ more transparent cards + glow centered on sides card: { position: "relative", borderRadius: 18, padding: "26px 26px 22px", background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.22)", // more transparent border: "1px solid rgba(255,160,60,0.18)", boxShadow: "inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.05), 0 18px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", backdropFilter: "blur(6px)", WebkitBackdropFilter: "blur(6px)", overflow: "hidden", }, cardHighlight: { background: "rgba(246,161,44,0.10)", border: "1px solid rgba(246,161,44,0.30)", boxShadow: "inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.06), 0 22px 70px rgba(246,161,44,0.10), 0 18px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, // side glow (center of left/right edges) // implemented via a subtle overlay using boxShadow-like gradient feel: // (kept minimal so it doesn’t “burn”) // You can increase opacity if you want stronger. // If you want it even more obvious: raise 0.12 -> 0.18 below. // (We can do that later.) // NOTE: pseudo-elements aren’t available inline, so we simulate with inner shadows + softer border. icon: { display: "block", width: 56, // ✅ bigger height: 56, // ✅ bigger margin: "0 auto 16px", objectFit: "contain", filter: "drop-shadow(0 10px 24px rgba(246,161,44,0.20))", }, cardTitle: { margin: 0, textAlign: "center", fontSize: 30, lineHeight: 1.15, fontWeight: 800, textShadow: "0 10px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, cardTitleCenter: { margin: 0, textAlign: "center", fontSize: 30, lineHeight: 1.15, fontWeight: 800, textShadow: "0 10px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, rule: { height: 1, margin: "16px 0 14px", background: "linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(246,161,44,0), rgba(246,161,44,0.35), rgba(246,161,44,0))", }, // ✅ tighter list spacing so nothing cuts off list: { margin: 0, padding: 0, listStyle: "none", display: "grid", gap: 10, // reduced spacing }, li: { position: "relative", paddingLeft: 22, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.78)", fontSize: 18, lineHeight: 1.25, textShadow: "0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)", }, ctaWrap: { textAlign: "center", marginTop: 34 }, ctaText: { margin: "0 0 14px", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.70)", fontSize: 20, textShadow: "0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, // ✅ button style closer to mockup ctaBtn: { display: "inline-flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 14, padding: "16px 26px", borderRadius: 12, border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18)", background: "linear-gradient(90deg, #FF9A1F 0%, #E87315 45%, #C95712 100%)", color: "#fff", fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 24, cursor: "pointer", boxShadow: "0 22px 55px rgba(255,140,40,0.18), 0 14px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)", textShadow: "0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)", }, playCircle: { width: 42, height: 42, borderRadius: 999, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.16)", display: "grid", placeItems: "center", boxShadow: "inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.10)", }, playTriangle: { width: 0, height: 0, borderTop: "8px solid transparent", borderBottom: "8px solid transparent", borderLeft: "12px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.95)", marginLeft: 2, }, ctaLabel: { lineHeight: 1, whiteSpace: "nowrap" }, };
